previous_loop: V13 v0.2 was published, V13 LoopKit was created, practical use cases were added, README Start Here was added, and the first self-application field note was published.
residue: The first proof-of-use shows CAP, not GO
The operator identified that public announcement itself may consume Carrier capacity if framed incorrectly
next_variable: Public framing: present V13 as a bounded research experiment rather than a finished product or GitHub-first promotion.

re_entry_capacity.notes: Re-entry capacity is preserved if exposure is capped to one announcement post and no repeated follow-up posting occurs within 48 hours.

cap_or_recheck: Publish at most one announcement post. Frame it as research progress and self-experimentation, not as a product launch. Do not post multiple follow-ups within 48 hours. Recheck after 48 hours or after one meaningful response.
next_loop_command: Prepare one capped announcement post that leads with the automation-loop problem, then mentions V13, then explains the self-experiment using the GitHub kit.
